title: Rhythm: full mastery paragraph
description: Long flowing paragraph at 100 WPM — final rhythm test
text: Two lessons from the finish, you are sitting at exactly one hundred words per minute — the number that separates fast typists from elite ones. To put that in perspective: most professional writers cap at sixty; senior journalists reach eighty on a good day; only stenographers and the world's fastest typists routinely cross a hundred. You are now among them. Hold this tempo through the final lesson.

tips.text: 100 WPM = top 1% of typists in the world
Two lessons left. Hold the rhythm.

character_tips.anna: 🎯 100 WPM! Top 1% of all typists. The world barely contains people who can do this.
character_tips.maxim: 100 WPM sustained = world-class. Take pride. Two lessons to go.
character_tips.klavochka: My star reaching the heavens ⭐ One hundred! Beautiful!
